inline_comments.message: This image is also used as a base for the opendaylight docker, which has not migrated yet to python 2. So, we either need to leave this docker as it currently is OR we need to change opendaylight/neon/neon-docker/src/main/docker/Dockerfile to use a different base image that installs python 2

I suggest that the opendaylight Dockerfle should also install python2 up until it is confirmed they don't need it anymore. All other uses can be python3-only, and the ODL image will support them either way.

Would the same python2 requirement apply to odlsli/odlsli-*/src/main/docker/Dockerfile?

The odlsli docker uses the opendaylight neon docker as its base, so if we install python 2 in the opendaylight neon container, we should be fine.
re
